def solve(landStartTime, landDuration, waterStartTime, waterDuration)
  n = landStartTime.length
  m = waterStartTime.length

  # Calculate all possible end times for land and water attractions
  land_end_times = []
  water_end_times = []

  # For each land attraction, calculate the end time if it is chosen first
  land_start_times = landStartTime
  land_durations = landDuration
  land_start_times.each_with_index do |start, i|
    land_end_times << [start + land_durations[i], i]
  end

  # For each water attraction, calculate the end time if it is chosen first
  water_start_times = waterStartTime
  water_durations = waterDuration
  water_start_times.each_with_index do |start, j|
    water_end_times << [start + water_durations[j], j]
  end

  # Sort land and water end times by their end time
  land_end_times.sort! { |a, b| a[0] <=> b[0] }
  water_end_times.sort! { |a, b| a[0] <=> b[0] }

  # Check all possible combinations of land and water attractions
  min_time = Float::INFINITY

  # Try all land attractions first
  land_end_times.each do |land_end|
    land_time, land_idx = land_end
    # Find the earliest water attraction that can be taken after the land attraction
    water_end_times.each do |water_end|
      water_time, water_idx = water_end
      # The water attraction can start at max(land_time, water_start_time)
      start_time = [land_time, water_start_time[water_idx]].max
      end_time = start_time + water_durations[water_idx]
      min_time = [min_time, end_time].min
    end
  end

  # Try all water attractions first
  water_end_times.each do |water_end|
    water_time, water_idx = water_end
    # Find the earliest land attraction that can be taken after the water attraction
    land_end_times.each do |land_end|
      land_time, land_idx = land_end
      # The land attraction can start at max(water_time, land_start_time)
      start_time = [water_time, land_start_time[land_idx]].max
      end_time = start_time + land_durations[land_idx]
      min_time = [min_time, end_time].min
    end
  end

  min_time
end

solve(landStartTime, landDuration, waterStartTime, waterDuration) ->
    N = length(landStartTime),
    M = length(waterStartTime),

    LandEndTimes = get_end_times(landStartTime, landDuration),
    WaterEndTimes = get_end_times(waterStartTime, waterDuration),

    LandEndTimesSorted = sort_by_end_time(LandEndTimes),
    WaterEndTimesSorted = sort_by_end_time(WaterEndTimes),

get_end_times(Starts, Durations) ->
    lists:zip(Starts, Durations)
        |> lists:map(fun({Start, Duration}) -> {Start + Duration, Start} end).

sort_by_end_time(Times) ->
    lists:sort(fun(A, B) -> A =< B end, Times).

calculate_min_time(LandEndTimes, WaterEndTimes, LandStarts, WaterDurations, WaterStarts, LandDurations) ->
    MinTime = infinity,

    % Try all land attractions first
    lists:foreach(
        fun({LandTime, LandIdx}) ->
            lists:foreach(
                fun({WaterTime, WaterIdx}) ->
                    StartTime = max(LandTime, lists:nth(WaterIdx + 1, WaterStarts)),
                    EndTime = StartTime + lists:nth(WaterIdx + 1, WaterDurations),
                    MinTime = erlang:min(MinTime, EndTime)
                end,
                WaterEndTimes
            )
        end,
        LandEndTimes
    ),

    % Try all water attractions first
    lists:foreach(
        fun({WaterTime, WaterIdx}) ->
            lists:foreach(
                fun({LandTime, LandIdx}) ->
                    StartTime = max(WaterTime, lists:nth(LandIdx + 1, LandStarts)),
                    EndTime = StartTime + lists:nth(LandIdx + 1, LandDurations),
                    MinTime = erlang:min(MinTime, EndTime)
                end,
                LandEndTimes
            )
        end,
        WaterEndTimes
    ),

    MinTime.

  m = waterStartTime.length

  land_end_times = []
  water_end_times = []

  land_durations = landDuration
  land_start_times.each_with_index do |start, i|

  water_start_times = waterStartTime

  water_start_times.each_with_index do |start, j|

  water_end_times.sort! { |a, b| a[0] <=> b[0] }

  end
